title: campanula wattiana
intro: Campanula wattiana, also known as the New Zealand bellflower, is a species of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Campanula wattiana include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which are used to treat various ailments.
